content.text:
Recent top and latest X posts matching your query "(Foundry AI OR Foundry framework OR Grok framework OR NotebookLM OR Momentum AI) lang:en" primarily highlight developments around **Azure AI Foundry** and **Microsoft Foundry**, with some mentions of agent frameworks named Foundry, Google's NotebookLM integrations, and passing references to Grok models in AI workflows. No direct hits on "Momentum AI" or a specific "Grok framework," though Grok models appear in comparisons.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019127913409573195)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018761773545881909)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018055322485559305)

### Key Highlights:
- **Azure AI Foundry**: Google's Genkit framework announced official support for it (alongside Amazon Bedrock) in both Go and JS plugins. This enables "build once, run anywhere" cloud-native AI apps.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019127913409573195)
- **Microsoft Foundry**: Multiple posts promote a 6-week training course titled "Mastering the Microsoft Agent Framework: Building Enterprise-Ready AI Agents with Microsoft Foundry" (March 10–April 14, 2026), led by speaker Lino Tadros. Includes videos and enrollment links via Live! 360 events.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018761773545881909)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018761772040155174)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018761755908800529)
- **Foundry (AI Agent)**: @getFoundry introduced "Foundry: the self-writing meta-extension for @openclaw," an AI agent that learns user workflows, researches docs, and extends itself. Backed by NVIDIA Inception, with a token $FDRY.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2017410944008085927)
- **NotebookLM**: Featured in an AI tool selection guide as a top integration for Gemini (e.g., for research and contextual thinking), positioned as "#1 in accuracy and intent alignment."[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018055322485559305)
- **Grok-Related Mentions**: Grok models (e.g., Grok-4.1, grok-4-1-fast-reasoning) praised for real-time analysis, cultural insights, and agentic workflows alongside tools like OpenClaw/Moltbot. No dedicated "Grok framework" posts, but used in comparisons with Claude, Gemini, etc.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2017805370673201298)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018055322485559305)[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2017467488221728932)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2018296355312029812)

These are the most relevant from the top 10 latest/top results (as of Feb 5, 2026). Activity spikes around Microsoft/Azure integrations and agent tools. If you want deeper dives (e.g., threads, videos, or user profiles), provide more details! [[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2018825976856318256)
